title: v2, podman: fix pod tests
body:
fix remaining failures with pod tests.

Only pause and pod stats are not addressed in this PR, since we are already tracking pause and pod stats in:

https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/5975
https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/5966

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>
